reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) They refused to fill up the car, which had Chilean license plates. They said they didn't fill up for foreigners. They could have charged more, but refusing is absurd; many foreigners enter the country on vacation and spend days there, not all of them just to refuel.

(Original)
Se recusaram a abastecer o carro, estava com carro de placa chilena. Disseram que não abasteciam para estrangeiros. Poderiam cobrar mais, mas se recusar é absurdo, muitos estrangeiros entram no país de viagem e passam dias no país, não todos entram só para abastecimento.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSNXJ1WmZnEAE
